subcodes.first_line: O my God, my Master, my Aspiration! I beseech Thee by Thy Name whereby Thou hast opened the gates of men’s hearts unto recognition
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا قلم الاعلی اذکر امتک التی آمنت بک و اقبلت الیک لیجذبها ما جری منک من لدن
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for women, @power of prayer, @spiritual transformation, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times
